metadata.description: Platform engineering skill suites: agentic-readiness assessment and research authoring.

plugins.name: platform-assessment
plugins.description: Assess an engineering org's platform and agentic readiness: ASDLC maturity scoring, platform ROI scorecard, org design, security/governance playbook, industry benchmarking, and IDP/ADP target architecture.

plugins.name: authoring
plugins.description: Turn research and interviews into publishable deliverables: evidence-first research briefs and interview-based case studies.
